contract_tests.name: phase8_signed_command_submission_public_overgate
contract_tests.blocker: blocked until local stack exposes the owning public Overgate/control-plane service
assertions: signed command reaches public Overgate route
audit ref is returned by service evidence

contract_tests.name: phase8_duplicate_idempotency_public_overgate
contract_tests.blocker: blocked until local stack exposes the owning public Overgate/control-plane service
assertions: same idempotency key resolves duplicate response
conflicting request hash stays a stable error

contract_tests.name: phase8_status_read_public_control_plane

assertions: status reads use public control-plane route

pagination and audit refs are preserved
